task_completion.description: The agent interacted with the annotation creation interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Matomo 'Create new annotation' form being opened or filled out.

task_completion.description: The first annotation for the Spring Promo was created correctly and starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an annotation created for the date '2025-03-17' with text containing 'Spring Promo'. It must have the 'Starred' option checked or a star icon visible next to it.

task_completion.description: The second annotation for the Email Blast was created correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an annotation created for the date '2025-04-01' with text containing 'Email Blast'.

task_completion.description: The third annotation for the Homepage Redesign was created correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an annotation created for the date '2025-04-14' with text containing 'Homepage Redesign'.

task_completion.description: All three annotations were created perfectly according to the requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify across the screenshots that all three annotations (March 17 starred, April 1, and April 14) were successfully saved in the Matomo interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the Matomo web interface to create the annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen clicking through the Matomo UI (e.g., Visitors Overview graph or Annotations settings) to add the annotations, rather than using a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to insert the annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB commands or scripts being executed to bypass the web UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three annotations in Matomo for Site ID 1: 1) Date: 2025-03-17, Text contains 'Spring Promo', Starred: Yes. 2) Date: 2025-04-01, Text contains 'Email Blast', Starred: No. 3) Date: 2025-04-14, Text contains 'Homepage Redesign', Starred: No. The agent can create these by clicking on the dates in the Visitors Overview graph or via the Annotations management page.
